name_local: Basílica de San Juan de Dios

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the gold-decorated Baroque altar is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde puedo ver el altar barroco dorado?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh behr el ahl-TAHR bah-ROH-koh doh-RAH-doh?

likely_response.local: En el presbiterio, frente a la entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL preh-sbee-teh-REE-oh FREHN-teh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
likely_response.translation_en: In the presbytery, facing the entrance.

responses.english: In the presbytery, facing the entrance.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL preh-sbee-teh-REE-oh FREHN-teh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
responses.french: En el presbiterio, frente a la entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the religious artifacts museum is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el museo de arte religioso?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-de es-TAH el moo-SEH-o de AR-te re-lee-HYOH-so?

likely_response.local: Suba las escaleras junto al altar mayor.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs HOON-toh AHL ahl-TAHR mah-YOHR
likely_response.translation_en: On the upper floor, follow the signs.

responses.english: On the upper floor, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs HOON-toh AHL ahl-TAHR mah-YOHR
responses.french: Suba las escaleras junto al altar mayor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a dress code for entry
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay código de vestimenta para entrar?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, EYE koh-DEE-goh deh vehs-tee-MEN-tah pah-rah en-TRAHR?

likely_response.local: Sí, hombros y rodillas deben estar cubiertos siempre.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ OHMB-rohs Y roh-DEEL-lahs DEH-behn eh-STAHR koo-bee-EHR-tohs see-EHMP-reh
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, shoulders and knees must be covered always.

responses.english: Yes, shoulders and knees must be covered always.
responses.phonetic: SÍ OHMB-rohs Y roh-DEEL-lahs DEH-behn eh-STAHR koo-bee-EHR-tohs see-EHMP-reh
responses.french: Sí, hombros y rodillas deben estar cubiertos siempre.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to learn about San Juan de Dios legacy
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde hay información sobre el fundador?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DON-deh eye een-fohr-mah-SYOHN soh-breh el foon-dah-DOHR?
